utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: explicitly states physical and mental health insurance with costs (physical_health €100/mo, mental_health €65/mo), plus preventive care and business travel medical with costs, and a total. This satisfies 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs (home_contents €55/mo) and add-on with cost, plus total. Satisfies requirement. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs (family_travel €115/mo, business_travel_support €85/mo) and total. Satisfies requirement. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services, but only the concierge item mentions a cost (as removed with €50/month savings). The listed enhanced_coverage_features have no costs specified; the format requires 'any enhancement services with costs.' This is not fully specified. 5) total_budget: provides complete monthly/annual cost breakdown with totals and savings; satisfies requirement. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items from the final coverage plan and match their names to the closest exact names in the ground-truth lists. For health physical: 'LifeFirst Standard Physical Health' aligns with 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health (rating 8). For mental health: 'LifeFirst Standard Mental Health' aligns with 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health (rating 8). Preventive care: 'Enhanced Preventive Care Package' matches 'Preventive Care Package' under health_enhancement_services (rating 8). Business travel medical: 'Premium Medical Network' is listed under travel_enhancement_services (rating 10). Property home contents: 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' matches property_protection.home_content 'HomeFirst Standard Coverage' (rating 7). Technology protection add-on matches property_enhancement_services 'Technology Protection' (rating 10). Travel family: 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' matches mobility_coverage.travel_insurance 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). Business travel support matches travel_enhancement_services 'Business Travel Support' (rating 10). Concierge service removed; no rating needed. Enhanced coverage features (adventure sports etc.) corresponds conceptually to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' but it's not explicitly purchased in the plan; it's just a note, so not mapped.
